debug_info.goal:
α : Type
s : Skeleton
leaf_data_tree : LeafData α s
f : FunctionType (InductiveMerkleTree.spec α)
⊢ runWithOracle f (InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree α s leaf_data_tree) =
    InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree_with_hash α s leaf_data_tree fun left right => @f (left, right)

proof:
have h₁ : ∀ {s : Skeleton} (leaf_data_tree : LeafData α s), (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree leaf_data_tree))
    = buildMerkleTree_with_hash leaf_data_tree fun (left right : α) =>
      (f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
    intro s
    induction s with
    | leaf =>
      intro leaf_data_tree
      cases leaf_data_tree with
      | leaf a =>
        simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
        <;> rfl
    | internal s_left s_right ih_left ih_right =>
      intro leaf_data_tree
      cases leaf_data_tree with
      | internal left right =>
        simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, ih_left, ih_right]
        <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash, spec]
            <;> congr <;> ext p <;> simp_all [Prod.exists]
            <;> aesop
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash, spec]
            <;> rfl
          })
  exact h₁ leaf_data_tree
failed_attempts:
have h : (runWithOracle fun ⟨x, y⟩ => f (x, y) (buildMerkleTree leaf_data_tree)) =
      buildMerkleTree_with_hash leaf_data_tree (fun (left right : α) => f (left, right)) := by
    skeletonInit
    induction s with
    | leaf =>
      match leaf_data_tree with
      | LeafData.leaf a =>
        simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle]
        <;>
        (try decide) <;>
        (try rfl)
    | internal s_left s_right ih_left ih_right =>
      match leaf_data_tree with
      | LeafData.internal left right =>
        simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle] at ih_left ih_right ⊢
        <;> simp_all [singleHash, query]
        <;>
        (try decide) <;>
        (try rfl)
        <;>
        (try simp_all [runWithOracle])
        <;>
        (try simp_all [singleHash, query])
        <;>
        (try decide)
        <;>
        (try rfl)
  exact h

induction s with
  | leaf =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.leaf a =>
      unfold buildMerkleTree
      simp only [runWithOracle_pure, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
      <;> simp_all [spec]
      <;> rfl
  | internal s_left s_right left_ih right_ih =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.internal left right =>
      unfold buildMerkleTree
      simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
      <;> simp_all [spec]

induction s with

  | internal s_left s_right left_ih right_ih =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.internal left right =>
      unfold buildMerkleTree
      rfl

induction s with
  | leaf =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.leaf a =>
      simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle]
    | _ => contradiction
  | internal s_left s_right ih₁ ih₂ =>
    match leaf_data_tree with

    | _ => contradiction

have h : ∀ (s : Skeleton) (l : LeafData α s), (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree l)) = (buildMerkleTree_with_hash l fun (left right : α) => f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
    intro s l
    induction s with
    | leaf =>
      match l with
      | LeafData.leaf a =>
        simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
      | _ => contradiction
    | internal s_left s_right ih_left ih_right =>
      match l with
      | LeafData.internal l r =>
        simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle]
        <;>
        (try
          {
            congr 1 <;>
            (try simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash]) <;>
            (try congr 1 <;> simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash]) <;>
            (try simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash])
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash]
            <;>
            rfl
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash]
            <;>
            aesop
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash]
            <;>
            congr 1 <;> simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash]
          })
      | _ => contradiction
  have h₁ : (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree leaf_data_tree)) = (buildMerkleTree_with_hash leaf_data_tree fun (left right : α) => f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
    apply h
  rw [h₁]
  <;>
  (try simp_all) <;>
  (try rfl)
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash]
      <;>
      congr 1 <;> simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash]
    })

`(buildMerkleTree_with_hash left ... ) >>= (fun left => (buildMerkleTree_with_hash right ... ) >>= (fun right => (f (left.root, right.root)) >>= (fun root => return FullData.internal root left right)))`

But `f (left.root, right.root)` is not a `FullData` but an `α`, so `(f ... ) >>= (fun root => ...)` doesn't make sense. 

Actually, `(fun root => return FullData.internal root left right)` expects a `root : α` and produces a `FullData α (internal ...)`.

But `(runWithOracle f (singleHash ...))` is `f (...) : α`, so `(fun x => runWithOracle f (n x))` becomes `(fun _ => (f (...) : α) >>= (fun root => ...))`, but this `f (...) : α` cannot be used in `>>=` because it is not an `OracleComp`.

Ah!

    sorry
  exact h s leaf_data_tree

induction s using Skeleton.Induction with
  | leaf =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.leaf a =>
      --Base case: the tree is a leaf
      rfl
  | internal s_left s_right ih_left ih_right =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.internal left_data right_data =>
      --Inductive step: the tree is internal
      simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle, ih_left, ih_right, Skeleton]
      <;>
      simp_all [Pair, Function.comp]
      <;>
      congr <;>
      simp_all [Pair, Function.comp]
      <;>
      try simp_all [Skeleton]
      <;>
      try congr
      <;>
      try simp_all [Pair, Function.comp]
      <;>
      try congr
      <;>
      try simp_all [Skeleton]
      <;>
      try congr
      <;>
      try simp_all [Pair, Function.comp]
      <;>
      try congr

induction leaf_data_tree with
  | leaf a =>
    -- Base case: the tree is a single leaf
    unfold buildMerkleTree
    simp [runWithOracle_pure, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
  | internal left right ih1 ih2 =>
    -- Inductive step: the tree is an internal node with left and right subtrees
    unfold buildMerkleTree
    simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
    <;>
    (try
      {
        congr 1 <;>
        ext <;>
        simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]
        <;>
        rfl
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        rfl
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]
        <;>
        rfl
      })

induction s with
  | leaf =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.leaf a =>
      unfold buildMerkleTree
      simp only [runWithOracle_pure, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
      <;> rfl
  | internal s_left s_right ih_left ih_right =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.internal left right =>
      unfold buildMerkleTree
      dsimp only at *
      -- Use the inductive hypotheses to simplify the left and right trees
      have h_left : runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree left) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash left (fun left right => f ⟨left, right⟩) := ih_left
      have h_right : runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree right) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash right (fun left right => f ⟨left, right⟩) := ih_right
      -- Simplify the root construction using these equalities
      rw [h_left, h_right]
      simp [runWithOracle_bind, singleHash, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [FullData.getRootValue]) <;>
      (try congr 1 <;> simp_all [FullData.getRootValue]) <;>
      (try rfl)

have h : ∀ (s : Skeleton) (d : LeafData α s), (runWithOracle f (InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree α s d)) = (InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree_with_hash α s d fun left right => @f (left, right)) := by
    intro s
    induction' s with s_left s_right ih_left ih_right
    · -- Base case: s is a leaf
      intro d
      cases d with
      | leaf a =>
        -- When d is a leaf, buildMerkleTree returns a leaf
        simp [InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree, runWithOracle_pure, InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
      | internal _ _ => contradiction -- d cannot be internal if s is a leaf
    · -- Inductive step: s is internal
      intro d
      cases d with
      | leaf a =>
        -- Contradiction: s is internal, d cannot be leaf
        contradiction
      | internal left right =>
        -- Compute left and right trees using induction hypothesis
        simp_all [InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree, runWithOracle_bind, InductiveMerkleTree.singleHash,
          InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree_with_hash, Prod.mk.injEq]
        <;>
        simp_all [runWithOracle_pure]
        <;>
        rfl
  -- Apply the general statement to the specific case
  exact h s leaf_data_tree

have h : ∀ {s} (t : LeafData α s), (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree t)) = (buildMerkleTree_with_hash t (fun left right => f ⟨left, right⟩)) := by
    intro s
    induction' s with s_left s_right ih_left ih_right
    · -- Case: s is a leaf
      intro t
      match t with
      | LeafData.leaf a =>
        simp [buildMerkleTree, runWithOracle_pure, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
      | _ => contradiction
    · -- Case: s is an internal node
      intro t
      match t with
      | LeafData.internal t_left t_right =>
        simp_all [buildMerkleTree, runWithOracle_bind, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, singleHash]
        <;>
        (try
          {
            congr 1 <;>
            ext <;>
            simp_all [FullData, getRootValue]
          })
        <;>
        (try aesop)
        <;>
        (try
          {
            cases s_left <;>
            cases s_right <;>
            simp_all [FullData, getRootValue]
          })
        <;>
        (try rfl)
  apply h

intro tree
    induction tree using LeafData.induction
    · -- Case: tree is a leaf
      simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle]
      <;> rfl
    · -- Case: tree is internal with left and right subtrees
      intro left right ih_left ih_right
      simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle, runWithOracle_bind, singleHash, runWithOracle_pure]
      <;>
      (try cases s <;> simp_all [Skeleton.leaf, Skeleton.internal]) <;>
      (try simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]) <;>
      (try congr <;> simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]) <;>
      (try rfl) <;>
      (try simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq])
      <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [Function.comp]
        <;>
        rfl
      })
  
  have h_final : runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree leaf_data_tree) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash leaf_data_tree (fun (left right : α) => @f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
    have h₁ := h_main leaf_data_tree
    exact h₁
  
  exact h_final

have h₁ : ∀ (s : Skeleton) (leaf_data_tree : LeafData α s), (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree leaf_data_tree)) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash leaf_data_tree fun (left right : α) => (f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
    intro s
    induction' s with s_left s_right IH_left IH_right
    · -- Case: s is a leaf
      intro leaf_data_tree
      match leaf_data_tree with
      | LeafData.leaf a =>
        simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_pure]
      | LeafData.internal _ _ =>
        exfalso
        trivial
    · -- Case: s is an internal node
      intro leaf_data_tree
      match leaf_data_tree with
      | LeafData.leaf _ =>
        exfalso
        trivial
      | LeafData.internal left right =>
        simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, singleHash]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]) <;>
        (try rfl) <;>
        (try simp_all [IH_left, IH_right]) <;>
        (try simp_all [Function.funext_iff]) <;>
        (try aesop)
        <;>
        (try {
          ext ⟨a, b⟩
          <;> simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]
          <;> aesop
        })
  -- Apply the general result to the specific case
  have h₂ := h₁ s leaf_data_tree
  exact h₂

have h : (runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree leaf_data_tree)) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash leaf_data_tree fun (left right : α) => (f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
    induction leaf_data_tree with
    | leaf a =>
      simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, FullData]
    | internal _ _ left right ih_left ih_right =>
      simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle, Function.comp]
      <;> rfl
  exact h

    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.leaf a =>
      simp [buildMerkleTree, runWithOracle_pure, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
      <;> rfl
  | internal s_left s_right left_ih right_ih =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.internal left right =>
      simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
      <;> congr 1

have h₃ : v = u + 1 := by omega

have h₁ : ∀ (s : Skeleton) (leaves : LeafData α s), runWithOracle f (InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree leaves) = InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree_with_hash leaves (fun x y => f ⟨x, y⟩) := by
    intro s
    skeleton indexed_induction s with
    | nil =>
      intro leaves
      match leaves with
      | ⟨a⟩ => rfl
    | cons s' i =>
      sorry
  exact h₁ s leaves

-- Use skeleton_induction to handle different cases of the leaf data tree
  have h₁ : ∀ (s : Skeleton) (t : LeafData α s), runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree t) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash t (fun (left right : α) => f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
    intro s
    intro t
    skeleton_induction t s
    -- Case: when the tree is a leaf
    <;> simp_all [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure]
    <;> funext left right
    <;> simp_all [Function.comp_def]
    <;> rfl
  -- Apply the general result to the specific case
  have h₂ := h₁ s leaf_data_tree
  exact h₂

have h_main : ∀ (s : Skeleton) (t : LeafData α s) (f : (α × α) → α), runWithOracle f (buildMerkleTree t) = buildMerkleTree_with_hash t (fun a b => f ⟨a, b⟩) := by
    intro s
    induction s using Skeleton.recOn
    <;> intros t f
    <;> cases t with
    | leaf a =>
      simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle]
    | internal left right =>

      (try simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons]) <;>
      (try simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons]) <;>
      (try simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons]) <;>
      (try simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash, Matrix.cons_val_zero, Matrix.cons_val_succ, Matrix.head_cons])
      <;>

  have h₁ := h_main s leaf_data_tree (fun (x : α × α) => f x)

        <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [runWithOracle, singleHash, spec]
            <;> rfl
          })
  exact h₁ leaf_data_tree
